purpose: Structured intake list for Steinmetz works identified from the Charles Proteus Steinmetz Wikipedia bibliography, mapped to current repo processing status.

source_basis.label: Wikipedia, Charles Proteus Steinmetz, Bibliography: Works
source_basis.used_for: Initial bibliography checklist and acquisition queue only. Each work still requires direct source verification.

quality_rule: This manifest is an intake register, not a completed scholarly bibliography. Do not promote an entry to reviewed status until the source file, edition, OCR, page map, and citation metadata are verified against a primary scan or publication record.

status_legend.seeded_processing_source: A local source record and at least partial processed outputs already exist.
status_legend.edition_variant_seeded: The work is represented by a related local edition, but edition/year alignment needs review.
status_legend.planned_source_acquisition: A book, lecture collection, or pamphlet should be acquired and processed.
status_legend.planned_article_acquisition: An article or paper should be acquired, OCR'd, and indexed.
status_legend.posthumous_or_late_publication_candidate: Publication may be posthumous or later than the original work; verify chronology before interpretation.
status_legend.repo_extra_candidate: Present in the repo but not in the current Wikipedia works checklist.

entries.title: On the Law of Hysteresis
entries.publication_note: Transactions of the American Institute of Electrical Engineers, IX (2): 3-64.
entries.processing_intent: Foundational source for Steinmetz's hysteresis law, magnetic loss, and the later Steinmetz equation.

entries.title: Complex Quantities and Their Use in Electrical Engineering
entries.publication_note: Proceedings of the International Electrical Congress Held in Chicago, August 21-25, 1893, pp. 33-74.
entries.processing_intent: Flagship source for complex quantities, the symbolic method, and early phasor engineering.

external_refs.value: Proceedings of the International Electrical Congress Held in Chicago, August 21-25, 1893, pp. 33-74.

entries.title: Theory of the General Alternating Current Transformer
entries.publication_note: Transactions of the American Institute of Electrical Engineers, 12th General Meeting: 245-256.
entries.processing_intent: Transformer theory, magnetic circuit language, equivalent circuit history, and AC apparatus terminology.

entries.title: Theory and Calculation of Alternating Current Phenomena
entries.publication_note: First edition with Ernst J. Berg; the repo currently uses a later local edition and must keep edition differences visible.
entries.processing_intent: Earliest book edition now separated for edition comparison.

entries.title: The Alternating Current Induction Motor
entries.publication_note: Transactions of the American Institute of Electrical Engineers, XIV (1): 183-217.
entries.processing_intent: Induction motor theory, rotating field language, slip, torque, and apparatus interpretation.

entries.title: The Natural Period of a Transmission Line and the Frequency of Lightning Discharge Therefrom
entries.processing_intent: Lightning, surge frequency, distributed constants, natural period, and transmission-line wave behavior.

entries.title: Speed Regulation of Prime Movers and Parallel Operation of Alternators
entries.processing_intent: Power-station stability, alternator operation, speed regulation, and practical AC systems.

entries.title: Theoretical Elements of Electrical Engineering
entries.publication_note: Wikipedia cites the second edition; the local source is a later edition and needs edition mapping.
entries.processing_intent: General theory source for current, electromotive force, field language, induction, apparatus, and fundamental terms.

entries.title: The Alternating-Current Railway Motor
entries.processing_intent: Railway motor design, AC traction, torque-speed behavior, and apparatus comparisons.

entries.title: Lightning Phenomena in Electric Circuits
entries.processing_intent: Primary lightning, surge, impulse, and high-voltage transient source.

entries.title: Electrical Engineering Education
entries.processing_intent: Engineering education philosophy and Steinmetz's view of mathematical training.

entries.title: Primary Standard of Light
entries.processing_intent: Illumination standards, photometry, and measurement language.

entries.title: The General Equations of the Electric Circuit
entries.processing_intent: Bridge between symbolic method, differential equations, transients, and general circuit theory.

entries.title: General Lectures on Electrical Engineering
entries.processing_intent: Lecture-style source likely useful for readable crosslinks into theory, apparatus, power systems, and education.

entries.title: Prime Movers
entries.processing_intent: Power generation context, prime movers, and station engineering.

entries.title: The Value of the Classics in Engineering Education
entries.processing_intent: Historical and educational context.

entries.title: Radiation, Light and Illumination: A Series of Engineering Lectures Delivered at Union College
entries.processing_intent: First canonical source for radiation, light, electric waves, spectrum language, illumination, and ether references if present.

entries.title: The Future of Electricity
entries.publication_note: New York Electrical Trade School; OCLC 8899343.
entries.processing_intent: Philosophical and forecasting source, useful for Steinmetz's civilizational reading of electricity.

entries.title: Disruptive Strength with Transient Voltages
entries.processing_intent: Transient voltages, disruptive strength, insulation stress, and surge breakdown behavior.

entries.title: Mechanical Forces in Magnetic Fields
entries.processing_intent: High-value source for force, stress, pressure, and tension language in magnetic fields.

entries.title: Engineering Mathematics: A Series of Lectures Delivered at Union College
entries.processing_intent: Mathematical machinery for complex quantities, exponentials, trigonometric series, empirical equations, approximation, and engineering notation.

entries.title: Elementary Lectures on Electric Discharges, Waves and Impulses, and Other Transients
entries.processing_intent: Readable transient, discharge, wave, and impulse source for public-facing explanation layers.

entries.title: Theory and Calculation of Transient Electric Phenomena and Oscillations
entries.publication_note: Repo catalog year and edition metadata require alignment with the cited Wikipedia entry.
entries.processing_intent: Core mathematical source for transient terms, oscillations, surges, distributed constants, and wave propagation.

entries.title: Some Problems of High-Voltage Transmissions
entries.processing_intent: Transmission voltage, insulation, line behavior, and high-voltage engineering language.

entries.title: The death of energy and the second law of thermodynamics, with particular reference to the thermodynamics of the atmosphere
entries.processing_intent: Thermodynamic and philosophical context; label carefully outside electrical-engineering core.

entries.title: Instability of Electric Circuits
entries.processing_intent: Circuit instability, cumulative effects, oscillations, and protection language.

entries.title: Recording Devices
entries.processing_intent: Instrumentation and measurement context.

entries.title: Outline of Theory of Impulse Currents
entries.processing_intent: Direct source for impulse-current and surge mathematics.

entries.title: America and the New Epoch
entries.processing_intent: Nontechnical social and historical thought; keep separate from electrical-source claims.

entries.title: Theory and Calculation of Electric Apparatus
entries.processing_intent: Apparatus theory, induction machines, transformers, magnetic circuits, loss, heating, and design formulas.

entries.title: America's Energy Supply
entries.processing_intent: Energy-system context and public engineering policy.

entries.title: The Oxide Film Lightning Arrester
entries.processing_intent: Lightning arresters, surge protection, oxide films, and high-voltage apparatus behavior.

entries.title: The General Equations of the Electric Circuit-III
entries.processing_intent: Continuation of Steinmetz's general circuit equation program.

entries.title: Power Control and Stability of Electric Generating Stations
entries.processing_intent: Power system stability, control, synchronism, and generation station dynamics.

entries.title: Condenser Discharges Through a General Gas Circuit
entries.processing_intent: Gas discharge behavior, condenser discharge, oscillation/damping, and high-voltage transients.

entries.title: High-Voltage Insulation
entries.processing_intent: Insulation stress, breakdown, dielectric materials, and high-voltage engineering.

entries.title: Frequency Conversion by Third Class Conductor and Mechanism of the Arcing Ground and Other Cumulative Surges
entries.processing_intent: Nonlinear discharge, arcing-ground, cumulative-surge, and frequency-conversion source.

entries.title: Four Lectures on Relativity and Space
entries.processing_intent: Steinmetz's late interpretation of relativity and space; essential for separating historical source claims from later ether-field readings.

entries.title: Cable Charge and Discharge
entries.processing_intent: Distributed capacity, cable charge/discharge curves, and line-transient behavior.

entries.title: Overdamped Condenser Oscillations
entries.processing_intent: Condenser oscillation edge cases; verify authorship, date, and relation to transient theory before interpretation.

entries.title: Investigation of Some Trouble in the Generating System of the Commonwealth Edison Co.
entries.processing_intent: Practical diagnostic source already held locally; bibliographic authority pass and OCR remain pending.

entries.title: Theory and Calculation of Alternating Current Phenomena
entries.processing_intent: Early revised edition between the first edition and the later 1916 text.

entries.title: Theory and Calculation of Electric Circuits
entries.processing_intent: Distinct core source for circuit equations and calculation, not the same as Electric Apparatus.

entries.title: Electric Discharges, Waves and Impulses
entries.processing_intent: Expanded transient lecture edition; strengthens waves, impulses, and lightning pages.

entries.title: Systems of Electric Transmission and Distribution
entries.processing_intent: Compact source for power transmission, distribution, phase systems, and early AC system selection.

entries.title: Steinmetz Electrical Engineering Library
entries.processing_intent: May bundle important instructional material or compiled lecture content.

external_refs.value: Treat this as a multi-volume library/series until each volume is verified individually.

entries.title: Charles Proteus Steinmetz Papers - Union College
entries.processing_intent: Potentially deepest source for writings, GE/publication drafts, notes, ledgers, and correspondence.

entries.title: Charles Proteus Steinmetz Collection - Carnegie Mellon University Archives
entries.processing_intent: Letters, photographs, and demonstration objects tied to Steinmetz and Four Lectures on Relativity and Space.

entries.title: Steinmetz Patents Corpus
entries.processing_intent: The patent corpus is the practical apparatus counterpart to the books and articles.

next_actions: Finish scan/PDF custody for all newly registered DOI, HathiTrust, archival, and patent targets.
Review the newly OCR-seeded Internet Archive editions for chapter-map accuracy.
Run edition-comparison passes between the 1897, 1900, and 1916 Alternating Current Phenomena editions.
Promote only scan-verified equations, diagrams, quotes, and interpretation layers.
